name: payments-scheduler
description: HTS payments scheduler template with Foundry contracts.

steps: Hedera precompiles are not available under Foundry forking yet, so deploy and run this template on Hedera testnet or mainnet— not on a local chain or forked Hedera.
+Testnet: set your deployer key (e.g. {run:generate}), then {run:deploy} --network hedera_testnet
+Mainnet: {run:deploy} --network hedera_mainnet (use your production keystore as documented in the Foundry package).
After deploy, verify on Hashscan: {run:verify:testnet} or {run:verify:mainnet} as appropriate.
